name: Improper Handling of Mixed Encoding
description: The product does not properly handle input that uses multiple different encodings simultaneously (e.g., mixing URL encoding with UTF-8, or combining HTML entities with percent encoding), allowing partial decoding to bypass security filters.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data using mixed encoding schemes that flows to CONTROL[security_filter] which only decodes one encoding type, while the downstream TRANSFORM or EXTERNAL decodes the remaining encoding and reveals malicious content, without a TRANSFORM[full_mixed_decode] normalizing all encodings before the filter
